_comment: HOW TO ADD MARKERS: Shift+Click on the map to get coordinates, then add a new entry here. Coords are [lat, lng] in Leaflet format (not pixel coords).

markers.name: Cerebrax
markers.description: A realm of crystallized thought and living knowledge.

markers.name: Ossathar
markers.description: A fortress-realm of petrified bone and calcified law.

markers.name: Dominion of Still Air
markers.description: A suffocating expanse of dead air and enforced silence.

markers.name: Veinspire
markers.subtitle: Sanguine Dominion
markers.description: Cathedral-city where blood is currency, prayer, and law. Campaign starting location.

markers.name: The Clockwork Sanctum
markers.description: A realm where time is literal and measured.

markers.name: The Crucible of Flesh
markers.description: A forge-realm of living sculpture and relentless perfection.

markers.name: The Blooming Rot
markers.description: A sentient forest where death feeds life and decay becomes growth.

markers.name: Vor'Khalem
markers.description: A wasteland of consumed meaning surrounding the Mouth of the World.

markers.name: Bastion of Fireblood
markers.description: A volcanic realm of burning desire and consuming passion.

markers.name: Elyara
markers.subtitle: Shattered Gravitas
markers.description: A realm where sound itself is power.

markers.name: Umbrasseur Isles
markers.description: Shadowed isles where identity is fluid and faces are currency.

markers.name: Nhalyrian Depths
markers.description: A submerged realm of living dreams and stolen consciousness.

markers.name: Crownfall
markers.description: Independent city protected by a barrier that muffles divine sight.

markers.name: The Pallid Crossroads
markers.description: A junction in The Unclaimed between Sovereign territories.

markers.name: Ashford
markers.description: Independent junction town in The Unclaimed.

markers.name: The Hand
markers.description: Eastern landmass. Destination of the Arterial Texts.

markers.name: The Hollow
markers.description: Where the party fought the Smoldering Remnant. Jonas died here.

markers.name: Gravenholm
markers.description: A remote settlement on the eastern reaches.

markers.name: Bone Graveyard
markers.description: A vast field of ancient bones.

markers.name: The Reach
markers.description: Bone bridge spanning a deep chasm — the only practical crossing between the central Unclaimed and the Left Hand.

markers.name: The Hexwright's Tower
markers.description: Floating spire of dimensional catastrophe. Abandoned mid-climb in Session 35; descending toward the earth.

markers.name: Overgrown Ruin
markers.description: Pre-Usurpation pale-stone structure in the Left Hand. Used by the party as a long-rest waypoint after Sol's death and ehn-varuu.

markers.name: Knuckle Pass (East)
markers.description: Bone corridor through Aedwynn's finger-ridges. Sol Raven was killed here by a Ridge-Stalker. The corridor was cleared in Session 36.

markers.name: Knuckle Pass (Centre)
markers.description: Bone corridor through Aedwynn's finger-ridges. Pack Hunter territory; crossed without combat in Session 36.

markers.name: Knuckle Pass (West)
markers.description: Bone corridor through Aedwynn's finger-ridges. A third Ridge-Stalker still holds this corridor.

markers.name: Left Hand — Southern Coast
markers.description: Newly-discovered southern coastline of the Left Hand. Found by the party while retreating from the Knuckle Pass after Sol's death.

markers.name: Basilica of the Unincarnate
markers.description: Pre-Usurpation Aedwynn-built temple in the deep Left Hand jungle. Found in Session 36. Still active — figment of the Maker beneath the nave; Galheran the Unmoved at the door.
